title: House of Marbles Go Fish Card Game
features: 【Enjoyment】 A colourful, sea-themed card game that will amuse and entertain even the youngest card players with their friends and family. While children learn memory, counting and sorting skills, they get a buzz once they have made a complete set or even told their friends or family to Fish!

【How To Play】 Five cards are dealt to each player. The remaining cards are messed up, face down between the players. Hold your cards so you can see them, but no one else can. The game aims to get all three of the same card, and when you do, you earn a point. Do you have any "Crabs"? If your opponent has one, they must give it to you; otherwise, they will tell you to "Go Fish!"

【Pocket Money Fun and Games】 Pocket money price points for kids with some money to spend. These playthings provide hours of fun, including recognisable traditional toys and games to the quirky and bizarre. Not only that, but this House of Marbles range is a great way to teach children the value of money.

【Travel】 This is excellent for taking with you when off on holiday, a weekend away, or even just down to the local park. It's a great alternative to keeping the children busy; it can help reduce their screen time and also get some quality family time in! With a compact size and weight, it is easy to pop it in your bag and play on the go!
【Child-Friendly Size】 Specially designed to be slightly smaller than a standard deck, making the cards easier for children to hold, shuffle and enjoy during play.

【Customer Guarantee】 Shop confidently and be supported by your friendly customer service team. We pride ourselves on ensuring you are delighted with your order. If, for any reason, you have any issues, please do not hesitate to contact us directly. We will be more than happy to resolve any problem with your item.
【Toy Safety】 WARNING: CHOKING HAZARD. This product is not for children under 3 years (36 months) of age, as small parts may present a choking hazard.
